headline: 3 Consumer Stocks That Concern Us
summary: Retailers are evolving to meet the expectations of modern, tech-savvy shoppers. One initiative that has proven effective is the expansion into e-commerce, which has helped the industry sustain its same-store sales growth and keep pace with the S&P 500’s 6.2% return over the past six months.
